description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on every push. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple environments including ubuntu-latest with Python 3.7-3.10, macos-latest with Python 3.9, and windows-latest with Python 3.9. For each job, check out the source code, set up Python and Node.js, install OS-specific dependencies, build the development environment, cache pip and npm caches, run tests, and upload code coverage to Codecov.
